programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Shotgun sports are experiencing unprecedented growth, with competitions across the country gaining popularity as enthusiasts vie to be the best shooters in the world. Every summer, the Amateur Trapshooting Association hosts The Grand American in Sparta, Illinois. This year marks the 125th Anniversary for the largest trap shooting competition in the world. We’ll talk with the people who make this tournament run behind the scenes and explore what makes this tournament such a special event. We’ll also look at the rich history of The Grand. On-site we’ll chat with the curator of the Trapshooting Hall of Fame and look at some of the incredible historical pieces on display in the museum. Additionally, we’ll learn about White Flyer and how the clay manufacturer has made important innovations for the shotgun sports.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Nobody chases the waterfowl migration as hard as Shawn Stahl of Team Winchester. The Michigan native spends over half of his year running the highways and flyways searching for the x. In this episode, we’ll tag along with Shawn and his crew with their Winchester pumps in hand as they hunker down hiding in fields and timber in hopes of locked wings from ducks and geese.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Overview: East Alton, Illinois is the home of Winchester Ammunition and the manufacturing home of the shotshell plants that build and produce millions of rounds of ammo for hunters, sport shooters, military and law enforcement. Get an unprecedented inside look at the birth cycle of a shotshell inside the walls of Winchester. From hull to primer, shot to wad and packaging to shipping, watch how the most legendary and successful ammunition brand in the world comes to is born and built.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Outlaw of the Range, 1936
programme.desc: A determined cowboy returns to his hometown to uncover the truth behind a series of cattle rustlings and land disputes that threaten local ranchers. As he digs deeper, he discovers a corrupt scheme driven by greed and betrayal. With danger closing in, he must rely on his courage and quick thinking to bring the outlaws to justice and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Gone With the West , 1975
programme.desc: Gone With the West , 1975

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A determined rancher and his allies stand up against a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of valuable land near Saddle Mountain. As tensions rise, courage and quick thinking are put to the test in a battle to protect rightful ownership and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Outlaws Of Boulder Pass 1942,
programme.desc: A lawman goes undercover to infiltrate a gang of outlaws operating out of Boulder Pass, uncovering a scheme of robbery and murder while working to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Sixgun Rhythm 1939
programme.desc: Melody meets mayhem in Sixgun Rhythm! When a singing cowboy rides into a town plagued by outlaws, he must trade his guitar for a six-shooter to defend the innocent. With gun-blazing action, spirited songs, and a dash of romance, this musical Western hits all the right notes of frontier adventure.

programme.title: Wolves of the Range

programme.title: In Old Caliente

programme.title: Dead for a Dollar

programme.title: Massacre Time 1966
programme.desc: In Massacre Time, Franco Nero blazes onto the Spaghetti Western scene as Tom Corbett, a drifter who returns home to find his family’s land stolen and his brother living in ruin. Together, the two face a ruthless tyrant and his sadistic son who rule with terror and bloodshed. Directed by Lucio Fulci, this violent, gripping tale delivers brutal gunfights, raw emotion, and the relentless pursuit of vengeance.
